name: Spicy Barbecue Wings
recipeInstructions:
This BBQ sauce is mild. If you prefer hotter wings, add more Louisiana hot sauce.
In a large heavy saucepan, mix together BBQ sauce ingredients. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
In a frypan or wok, heat oil to 375°F (190°C). Deep fry chicken wings in batches until cooked through, about 10-15 minutes. Drain fried wings on an absorbent towel.
When all the wings are cooked, place them in the simmering BBQ sauce. Stir to coat and serve.
